title: ctenodon riedelianus
intro: Ctenodon riedelianus is a species of plant, also known as the 'Riedel's Ctenodon', which belongs to the family of Rutaceae, commonly referred to as the citrus family. This plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, due to its rich composition of bioactive compounds. The health benefits associated with Ctenodon riedelianus include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help in treating various health conditions such as fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues. Ctenodon riedelianus can be prepared into herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
